author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Necrophosis: Full Consciousness - Launch Trailer
Necrophosis: Full Consciousness is out now on XBOX!

Necrophosis: Full Consciousness is a first-person horror adventure that plunges you into a nightmarish realm teeming with grotesque forms and ominous visuals. Prepare to delve into eerie landscapes, solve unnerving puzzles and uncover secrets in this atmospheric journey through the macabre.

This complete edition includes the base game 'Necrophosis' and the brand new DLC 'Subconsciousness'.
https://www.xbox.com/games/store/necrophosis-full-consciousness/9nhpjq77nc1w

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Nickelodeon Extreme Tennis: Next! | Launch trailer
Challenge a friend to a tennis match where you can play as SpongeBob, Aang, and all your Nickelodeon favorites in fast-paced, local split-screen action!

Whether you are planning your next couch competition or just looking for a fun, fast-paced game to share with friends and family, Nickelodeon Extreme Tennis: Next! is built to bring players together. Now live, you will be able to jump straight into the chaos, competition, and colorful energy of Nickelodeon’s iconic world.

You will be stepping onto the court with a lineup that feels like a nostalgic all-star team. From the undersea antics of SpongeBob to the elemental mastery of Aang, the roster pulls together 15 beloved Nickelodeon characters from across generations.

If you have been looking for your next local multiplayer go-to, this is it. You can challenge a friend to a 1v1 split-screen match and settle once and for all who rules the court. 

Ready for more ? 
Purchase now and rally with your favorite Nickelodeon crew! https://www.xbox.com/games/store/NET/9PPPJ8FC21VQ

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Mistfall Hunter Gameplay Deep Dive
Mistfall Hunter is a dark fantasy action extraction RPG set in Weavereach, a shattered world where the gods have perished and the Gyldenmist sweeps the realm. As a Gyldhunter, venture into the heart of the corruption solo or with up to two companions, defeating twisted creatures for their spoils or hunting rival Gyldhunters for their loot. Just be careful: if you die, you lose everything. To secure a safe return to the Windrest, Gyldhunters must track down extraction opportunities hidden within the realm and ring the bell known as Soul of Return to escape. However, the Gyldenmist may conceal more than one way out.

The first-ever XBOX open beta arrives June 14 at 6 PM PT. Stay connected and wishlist now to prepare for the hunt.

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/mistfall-hunter/9p8x6tvw9zw8

*PC gameplay captured*

CRASHOUT CREW | Out Now!
Time to clock in at DE NILE SHIPPING, the world’s “most efficient” warehouse! Work together in online co-op with up to 4 players to fulfill orders of increasingly chaotic, physics-based boxes. Time is money, and safety is no concern… just try not to crash out! Available now with XBOX Game Pass.

Planet Zoo 2 | Announce Trailer
Build a wilder world in Planet Zoo 2. Create distinctive zoos around the globe filled with awe-inspiring animals, including fully aquatic and flying species, before taking your experience beyond the zoo to release your animals into expansive Wildlife Reserves. 

Coming 13 October 2026!

text:
Corsair Cove - Release Date Announcement Trailer
Corsair Cove is coming to XBOX on PC and PC Game Pass on July 31st!

Build a sprawling pirate haven, raise a fleet to explore the high seas, and take on the Crown to keep the Age of Piracy alive! From ale to flintlock pistols, and from scallywags to swashbucklers, you’ll need to manage complex production chains and govern a rowdy crew to reign supreme over the seas!

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/corsair-cove/9PHS0189K408

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Street Fighter 6 - Ingrid Update Launch Trailer
Step into the light and experience the Ingrid Update in Street Fighter 6, packed with radiant new content!

☀️Harness the power of the sun! Master Ingrid's unique abilities through her Combo Trials and in-depth Character Guide.
🕹️Challenge new opponents and unlock costumes and classic character endings in Random Avatar Match and Avatar Arcade Mode.
🕴️New outfits like Outfit 3 for the Year 3 characters and free DriveTech Wear for all characters added!

Soak in the brilliance of this exciting update today!

Ingrid can be obtained individually with Fighter Coins, and the owners of the Year 3 Character Pass / Ultimate Pass will automatically get access to Ingrid. Owners of the Year 3 Ultimate Pass will also automatically get access to Sagat, C. Viper, Alex and Ingrid's Outfit 3.

Please note that Ingrid will be the final character to receive additional World Tour story content upon release. Previously added World Tour content will remain playable.

#StreetFighter6 #SF6 #Ingrid #capcom 

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/street-fighter-6/9nm79b7n9jm6

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Perceptum - Announcement trailer
Perceptum is a psychological horror game where you play as a medium investigating the disappearance of a family. Explore a house with an oppressive atmosphere, close your eyes to hear the beyond, use your mirror to see what should not exist and uncover the truth hidden within its walls.

Coming to XBOX Series X|S in 2027!
